task: Initialize data.ts with all mock data, types, and constants from the prompt
verification: Check data.ts for complete biographical data, exhibition records, and painting metadata.

task: Configure Tailwind CSS with the chosen grayscale palette and theme colors
verification: Verify tailwind.config.js and globals.css for consistent color definitions.

task: Setup React Router and define the main route structure
verification: Verify App.tsx or main entry point for correct route definitions and layout wrapping.

task: Implement atomic UI components (Button, Input, Chip, etc.) using shadcn/ui
verification: Check /components/ui/ for implemented components with data-testid.

task: Implement the Navigation Bar and Footer
verification: Verify nav and footer are visible and functional on all pages.

task: Implement Home Page (/) with hero reveal and featured tiles
verification: Verify 100vh hero, animations, and links to other pages.

task: Implement Biography Page (/life) with chapter navigation
verification: Verify sticky navigation and all five life chapters with correct content.

task: Implement Gallery Page (/gallery) with masonry grid and lightbox
verification: Verify thematic tabs, masonry layout, and functional lightbox with metadata.

task: Implement World Page (/world) with location panels and transitions
verification: Verify all four location panels and smooth transitions between them.

task: Implement Exhibitions Page (/exhibitions) with chronological record
verification: Verify timeline/table layout and all key exhibition entries.

task: Implement Archive Page (/archive) with legacy info and catalogue block
verification: Verify SDMC info, catalogue book block, and external links.

task: Implement Light/Dark mode toggle and ensure consistent rendering
verification: Toggle theme and check all components for color contrast and visibility.

task: Ensure full responsiveness across all pages and components
verification: Test on mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes.

task: Run final verification: lsp_diagnostics, build, and data-testid check
verification: Build succeeds and all components have data-testid.
